programme.desc: The latest news and reviews from the world of cars. Featuring the electric Kia Soul and the new Porsche Macan GTS.

programme.title: Motorsport UK
programme.desc: Richard John Neil action from Brands Hatch, featuring round 19 of the Ginetta GT4 Championship and round 26 of the British F4 Championship

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Miss King finds herself in a time warp while visiting an antique shop waking up in the room apparently 50 years earlier and addressed as Pandora. John Laurie (Dad's Army) guest stars, with Linda Thorson and Patrick Macnee

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: With Haskins in Toronto, his stand-in DCI Quirk (guest star Bill Maynard) becomes obsessed with catching a gang of thieves. When information is received suggesting the crooks are about to rob a jeweller's shop, officers are poised for action, but events take an unexpected turn as the informant seemingly has a score to settle with Quirk first. Hard-hitting police drama, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: The prospect of a police reward persuades Arthur to go on the trail of a petty criminal who has stolen a suitcase crammed with money. However, it transpires a gang of international counterfeiters is also after the cash. George Cole stars

programme.title: Hornblower
programme.desc: Newly promoted Captain Horatio Hornblower sets out to make his mark on the world, and soon manages to capture his first enemy vessel - only to discover a peace treaty has been signed, leaving him down and out, with barely a penny to his name. Fate seems to smile on the ambitious seafarer though, when he discovers the villainous Bonaparte has reneged on the treaty. Drama based on the CS Forester novels, starring Ioan Gruffudd, Robert Lindsay, Paul McGann, Greg Wise, Lorcan Cranitch and Julia Sawalha

programme.title: Snooker: Tour Championship Live
programme.desc: Jill Douglas presents coverage of the afternoon session on day seven at Celtic Manor resort in Newport, Wales, featuring the opening eight frames of the final. With analysis from Stephen Hendry, Alan McManus, Ken Doherty, Neal Foulds and Rob Walker, and commentary by David Hendon and Phil Yates

programme.title: The Big Fish Off
programme.desc: Team captains Ali Hamidi and Dean Macey are joined by snooker star Jimmy White and darts player Bobby George for some fishing fun in Oxfordshire

programme.title: Fishing Allstars
programme.desc: Dean Macey and Adam Rooney visit three diverse venues across England. They first target barbel on the River Trent alongside Matt Godfrey, before switching their attention to carp on the Grand Union Canal, and finally teaming up with Tom Dove and Steve Ringer at Earlswood Lake

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade visits the Alaskan wilderness in search of the Iliamna Lake monster of native legend that is said to drag people down to an icy grave. Subarctic fishing is a first for the extreme angler, who secures his largest catch to date as he pursues the mysterious creature

programme.title: Sport Filler Shows (2020)
programme.desc: A look back at a selection of sports covered by ITV, including horse racing, Formula One and darts

programme.title: Snooker: Tour Championship Live
programme.desc: Jill Douglas presents coverage of the evening session on day seven at Celtic Manor resort in Newport, Wales, featuring the conclusion of the final. This match last year featured Stephen Maguire and Mark Allen, who between them had caused a number of upsets in the quarter-finals and semi-finals. Maguire recovered from losing the opening two frames to win 10-6, securing his first triumph in a ranking tournament since 2013. With analysis from Stephen Hendry, Alan McManus, Ken Doherty, Neal Foulds and Rob Walker, and commentary by David Hendon and Phil Yates

programme.title: Death Race (2008)
programme.desc: Jensen Ames is framed for the murder of his wife and sent to Terminal Island Prison, a facility that broadcasts the highly profitable Death Race, a high-octane event where convicts battle to the death in customised cars. When a popular driver dies, crooked prison warden Hennessey persuades Ames to take his place, claiming he will be released if he is victorious. Sci-fi thriller, starring Jason Statham, Joan Allen, Ian McShane and Tyrese Gibson

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar poses as a Russian secret police chief to catch an assassin who has claimed the lives of 13 intelligence agents. Starring Roger Moore, Glynn Edwards and Burt Kwouk

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A suspect collapses while being questioned and rushed to hospital with injuries likely to have been incurred in an assault. Though innocent, Regan finds himself targeted by the man's vengeful brother who thinks the detective is responsible for his sibling's condition. Gwen Taylor guest stars in the police drama, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Doyle is shot by an intruder in his flat, and enters a near coma. Cowley fears a terrorist group - two of whose members were blown up during a recent car chase by CI5 - is responsible. While Doyle experiences surreal dreams involving a ghostly graveyard, Cowley and Bodie attempt to pursue the villain behind the attack. Action drama, with Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry acts as the bodyguard for a Lebanese businessman and diplomat. However, relationships between the two are strained and when their safe house is raided by gunmen, Terry's opinion of his charge reaches a new depth. Dennis Waterman and Kenneth Griffith star

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: A look at what goes into orange squash and a profile of a family firm making brooms. Plus, an insight into the care that goes into making a Savile Row suit, and how trumpets are handcrafted. Ricky Tomlinson narrates

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: Part one of two. First episode of the influential fantasy series, starring Michael Praed as Robin of Loxley, a simple villager who finds himself cast in the role of saviour of the common people. With Anthony Valentine and Nickolas Grace

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: A diamond trail leads Templar to mannequins and murder. Classic adventure, starring Roger Moore as globe-trotting adventurer Simon Templar

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: The unlikely duo investigate a case of caviar smuggling that led to murder. Feature-length episode of the detective thriller, starring Glynis Barber and Michael Brandon

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are assigned to prompt Arab cultural attache and assassin Rahad into carrying out a murderous deed, in the hope they can catch him red-handed just before he commits the act and force him out of the country. Comedy actor John Junkin guests stars alongside Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: A young widow is swindled out of her husband's insurance money by con artist Freddie Fenton (Derek Jacobi), so Terry responds by holding the crook's beloved Rolls Royce hostage. Comedy drama, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter are confronted by a reporter with information on the unsolved Golden Maid robbery. However, the newsman's strange behaviour raises more questions than answers. Classic police drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as Coronation Street's Hayley Tamaddon, football star Geoff Hurst, comedian Rob Beckett and presenter Gaby Roslin pit their wits against ruthless quiz geniuses in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds for charity. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Moto GP Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the first race of the season, the Barwa Grand Prix of Qatar, as the riders look to make a solid start and pick up crucial early points

programme.title: Police Academy (1984)
programme.desc: An American police college lowers its entrance requirements in the hope of attracting new recruits, and in response, assorted dubious candidates turn up for enrolment. A short-tempered instructor is determined to weed out the bad apples, but a riot provides the clueless cops with a chance to prove their worth. Comedy, starring Steve Guttenberg, Kim Cattrall, Bubba Smith and GW Bailey

programme.title: The Saint

programme.desc: A hijacked security van mysteriously disappears, and the stolen loot leaves no clues for the mismatched duo. Police drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are assigned to protect a deposed African politician, who is due to attend a conference with a view to regaining power. programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: A gambler is robbed of his winnings and calls on Arthur and Terry to help him track the money down. Comedy drama, guest starring Anthony Valentine and featuring an early appearance by Marina Sirtis (Star Trek: The Next Generation). With George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A surprising connection emerges when Haskins is framed for corruption, while Regan and Carter investigate a spate of break-ins. Police drama series, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as DJ Scott Mills, actress Sunetra Sarker, boxer Anthony Ogogo and TV presenter Johnny Ball pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Heathrow: Britain's Busiest Airport
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes of the airport, finding out how its infrastructure helps staff process thousands of passengers arriving from 84 countries. In 2019, the airport is having its busiest year to date, and are expecting more than 81 million passengers to fly in and out of the terminals, with its 76,000 staff ready to take on whatever is thrown at them

programme.title: Heathrow: Britain's Busiest Airport
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes of the airport, finding out how its infrastructure helps staff process thousands of passengers arriving from 84 countries. programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: As the Berlin trip concludes, one of the ladies can't seem to be on time to any of the scheduled events and surprisingly, it's not Dorit. 'Pretend amnesia' rears its ugly head again, and Erika is surprised to hear how Teddi truly feels about her. Kyle is still upset with Dorit, but chooses to ignore her own feelings for the sake of the trip. Dorit stresses over final preparations for her fashion show, fearing she will be unable to pull off her big comeback

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: A pregnant and glowing Porsha relives the highlights of her relationship with Dennis. Kandi updates the ladies on her surrogacy journey. Cynthia confronts Nene

programme.title: Masters of Flip
programme.desc: Husband-and-wife team Kortney and Dave Wilson flip a special home with historical value in the middle of Nashville - and do their best to keep its unique charm intact

programme.title: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: Noam and Ela's suburban party pad suited their lifestyle when it was just the two of them, but with the arrival of a baby girl, they need a house that better suits their growing family. If they are to sell their current place for top dollar, it needs a full makeover - both inside and out. Brothers Drew and Jonathan Scott offer the pair advice

programme.title: Dinner Date
programme.desc: Coren chooses three dates from five menus. The three men behind her chosen meals will each get the chance to entertain her, but she can choose only one chap to join her on another date. Which lucky fellow will join her for seconds?

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best
programme.desc: Reality series following the fortunes of self-made millionaire Todd Chrisley and his family. Chase gets on his parents' bad side, and Todd surprises Julie with a yacht

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best
programme.desc: Miley's illness leads to an unexpected reunion for Todd, and Chase struggles to apologise to Emmy

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: Kenya unleashes her opinions on Cynthia, and Porsha drops a bomb that no one was expecting. Cynthia and Kandi try to clean up the aftermath of the Barbie Bash

programme.title: The Millionaire Matchmaker
programme.desc: Real Housewives of Atlanta star Kenya Moore seeks LA matchmaker Patti Stanger's help, and brings along fellow cast member Cynthia Bailey for support. Singer-songwriter Taylor Dayne also enlists Patti in the hope of finding love

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex
programme.desc: Bobby throws a fundraising fashion show for Breast Cancer Awareness and invites the best-looking boys and girls to the catwalk to strut their stuff

programme.title: FYI Extra
programme.desc: Short bulletin rounding up the day's showbusiness stories

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard decides to tell his mother that he and Bernadette are engaged - but she later collapses, making him fear the shock of the news has caused her to suffer a heart attack. As the gang convenes at the hospital, Sheldon's fear of infectious diseases lands him in trouble, while Priya and Penny bond over coffee

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette receives her PhD, and the friends then tease Howard about being the only one among them who is not a doctor. Meanwhile, Raj becomes Sheldon's new flatmate after overhearing Leonard and Priya engaging in a Star Trek bedroom fantasy. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny worries about the consequences of spending the night with Raj, and Leonard's reaction confirms her worst fears. Meanwhile, Sheldon is more interested in the upcoming paintball competition, and tries to refocus the boys' attentions as they argue over the previous evening's activities. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge begins work as a church volunteer and restores Reverend Lovejoy's faith in his vocation, while Homer is baffled to discover his image printed on a box of Japanese washing powder

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Bart is knocked down by Mr Burns' car, Homer and lawyer Lionel Hutz see a chance to take advantage of Springfield's richest man by making a lucrative compensation claim

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer eats a poisonous fish and fears he has only 24 hours to live. As the minutes tick by, he embarks on a frantic race to put his affairs in order and accomplish everything he ever wanted to do but never did. With the guest voices of Larry King and George Takei

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart drives Lisa to distraction on a school trip, tormenting her until she takes out a restraining order forbidding him to come within 20ft of her. Just to be on the safe side, she uses a pole to make sure he keeps his distance. Meanwhile, Grampa is hurt in an incident involving a garden gnome

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Selma realises her hopes of ever bearing a child are diminishing and flies to China to adopt a baby. Asked to fill in her husband's name on the application, she pretends to be married to Homer - but the company co-ordinator (guest star Lucy Liu) sees through the deception. Also featuring the voices of Robert Wagner and David Silverman

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by Kelly Holmes, who talks about her physical and mental health platform, Joe Sugg, who chats about the TV drama The Syndicate, and Marti Pellow who discusses his new album, Stargazer. Rochelle Humes talks about the Channel 4 documentary, The Black Maternity Scandal: Dispatches. Nick Helm talks about the screening of his show, Phoenix from the Flames. Conrad Khan chats about being nominated for the BAFTA Rising Star award. And there's music in the studio from Dodie

programme.title: A Taste of Italy
programme.desc: Chef and restaurateur Nisha Katona travels to the coastal city of Syracuse in Sicily, where she discovers that it has a lot more than just pizza and pasta to offer

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: MC Dizzee Rascal, radio DJ Nick Grimshaw, psychologist Philippa Perry and actor-writer Reece Shearsmith brave the baking tent in the name of charity. All that stands between them and the title of Star Baker are three challenges - vegetable slices, a 'right royal' technical and a biscuit selfie depicting themselves at work. Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith judge their efforts, while Matt Lucas shouts out how much time is remaining in a silly voice

programme.title: Rango (2011)
programme.desc: A pet chameleon with an active imagination ends up lost in the desert. He makes his way to a lawless town of animals, where he is mistaken for a deadly gunslinger and made sheriff. He organises the townsfolk into a posse when bandits led by an evil rattlesnake steal their supply of water. Oscar-winning animated comedy, with the voices of Johnny Depp, Isla Fisher and Bill Nighy

programme.title: Ice Age (2002)
programme.desc: Three mismatched prehistoric animals join forces to return a human infant to its tribe - but as their journey unfolds, the creatures fail to anticipate the many perils and pitfalls that lay in store for them. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of John Leguizamo, Ray Romano, Denis Leary, Goran Visnjic and Jack Black

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel Strawbridge turn their attentions to the wash house - a shell of an old stone building on the far side of the moat. They have visions of turning it into a bathroom for their 40-foot boat on the moat, complete with all eco-friendly mod cons. And it's not long before the whole family get to work clearing the overgrown site so the project can begin

programme.title: Scotland's Scenic Railways
programme.desc: Featuring a ride on the stunning West Highland line, where an ingenious 19th-century invention is still protecting Scotland's railway from rockfall. Plus, a look at the profit to be made from collecting old railway memorabilia, the team tasked with cleaning Britain's largest station roof at Edinburgh Waverley, and follow artist Leo du Feu, who paints castles from trains

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Steve Jones presents action from the opening round of the campaign at Bahrain International Circuit. Lewis Hamilton of Mercedes went into this race as the man to beat, having prevailed here and gone on to win his seventh world title last year. Hamilton and rival Sebastian Vettel have dominated this race since 2012, with both drivers winning it on four seperate occasions. With analysis from David Coulthard and Mark Webber

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 3 (2017)
programme.desc: Following their win at the world championship, the now-separated Bellas (an all-female a cappella singing group) reunite for one last singing competition at an overseas USO tour. However, they face a squad who uses both instruments and voices. Final part of the blockbusting comedy trilogy, starring Anna Kendrick, Rebel Wilson and Brittany Snow

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to La Grange, a suburb of Chicago, to help the owners of Cafe 36, an upmarket bistro threatening to destroy the marriage of its owners due to the scale of their financial losses. The head chef's attitude to quality control is driving customers away, and it is up to Gordon Ramsay to turn the business around

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Straight-talking Mel and partner Patrick host night one in the Lincolnshire town of Grimsby with a traditional menu, followed by seasoned ravers Amber and Ryan. Their goat's cheese starter is not to everyone's taste on the second evening, and tensions run high on the final night as hosts Vanessa and Steve won't take any rudeness from Mel. It's not long before sparks fly around the table

programme.title: The Handmaid's Tale
programme.desc: A frustrated Serena Joy becomes desperate, and the Commander tries to make amends. Nick pushes Eden further away, and Offred is faced with an unexpected reunion

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George's continued renovation mission takes him to Moseley and Wheaton Aston in the West Midlands. He begins with a conversion to unite upstairs and downstairs flats in an Arts and Crafts building, although one of his suggestions leaves the owners speechless. He also visits an 18th-century pub that has fallen victim to some dodgy DIY - and quickly devises a clever plan to make the most of the period features

programme.title: Fifteen to One
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig hosts the general knowledge quiz, in which 15 contestants are pitted against one another in the hope of securing a place in the end-of-series final when a £40,000 jackpot will be up for grabs

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: Seven more couples board the coach, visiting some of southern Europe's leading party spots to win a luxury stay in Ibiza. Brendan Sheerin is back to act as tour guide and try to keep them in check, with the competition kicking off in Magaluf

programme.title: Countdown

programme.title: Countdown

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: In the fifth season premiere, Molly returns home after eight weeks at the prestigious writers' workshop with exciting news - she is getting her book published and has received a generous advance. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Carl has a suggestion for Mike that regular sex could be stifling Molly's creativity, as she reluctantly admits that she is suffering from writer's block. Starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Part one of three. Don the plumber asks Rebecca to marry him, while Sam sees Diane on a TV awards show and makes the decision to get back in touch with her

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Part two of three. Woody's new post as a city counsellor enables him to help Norm get a new job, while an unexpected turn of events could lead to a reconciliation for Sam and Diane

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie is stunned when God seemingly grants her prayers for a pay rise - so starts putting in more, far-from-spiritual requests with the Almighty. Doug tries to talk her out of it but, with an important football game on the horizon, he decides he could do with a bit of divine intervention himself

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug coaches a kids' football team, but is persuaded by Deacon's son to take up the sport himself. Though Carrie is impressed with his new determination to get into shape, he soon realises how unfit he has become once he takes to the field

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier befriend Kirby, whose girlfriend's grandfather is a well-known wine connoisseur. Martin is forced to wear a device to monitor his blood pressure. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Seattle shrink's agent Bebe puts her lowly assistant in charge of his career when a popular new radio psychiatrist appears on the scene. Meanwhile, Martin seems unwilling to make a doctor's appointment. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge joins Elaine and David as they look around an 1850s chateau with 25 rooms, telling them what to look out for when buying such a vast property. The programme also catches up with Tim and Krys from the first series, who renovated rooms for a boutique B&B in the Dordogne, but have been struggling to juggle parenthood with running the business

programme.title: The Great House Giveaway

programme.desc: Englishman Andrew and his Sweden-born wife Sophia kick off the competition in Glasgow, with a Swedish-inspired menu. On the second night, Brian and Victoria host with a 'vaguely' Scottish theme, but things don't exactly go as planned when Andrew reveals he doesn't like spice or lentils, both of which are on the menu. Finally, it's David and Sarah's turn to impress with a menu that represents their heritage, with dishes from Russia, Armenia and a Scottish/American dessert

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps a couple who run a pub-restaurant in County Durham to find a home on the Greek island of Kefalonia on a budget of £120,000

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A couple from Hull open a family-friendly B&B in a French national park, while two teachers from Kent attempt to turn a piggery into a restaurant in the Spanish desert

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The week's first visit is to Carly Cornwall's Juniperlea Inn in Midlothian, where the roadside location causes sleepless nights and one guest announces that they would not return

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns hires a hard-working, conscientious new employee, who takes an instant dislike to the slobbish Homer and sets about trying to humiliate him. Meanwhile, Bart buys an abandoned factory for a dollar at a government auction and gives Milhouse the job of nightwatchman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Troy McClure hosts three spin-off segments, transplanting characters from the show into new situations and locations, including Chief Wiggum's attempt to make his name as a private investigator, ably assisted by streetwise sidekick Principal Skinner, alias 'Skinny Boy'

programme.desc: It's the grand opening of Trish's dance school at Hollyoaks High, and its success becomes more important than ever when one of her dance rivals turns up

programme.title: Channel 4 News

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: Rochelle Humes investigates the high rates of black women dying in pregnancy and childbirth. She uncovers the stories of expectant mothers, bereaved families, and those who survived a near miss to discover how racial bias has influenced the provision of maternal care and what can be done to prevent further tragedies

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking Family Favourites
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates a simple recipe for a one-pan wonder chicken and pepper curry, served with a flatbread flavoured with a hit of mustard. He also prepares pierogi dumplings stuffed with broccoli and cheese, and shows how to fry them until they are crispy on the bottom and fluffy on the top

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: The police investigate an apparently unprovoked attack that has left a man fighting for his life after being shot in the chest at point blank range by a complete stranger. As Bedfordshire Police's Guns & Gangs unit comes under increasing pressure to catch the shooter before he strikes again, a woman arrives at Luton police station to report being threatened by a man who matches the description

programme.title: The Circle
programme.desc: Popularity contest in which individuals from all walks of life compete to win a cash prize They will all live in one modern block, but separately in individual apartments, interacting with one another exclusively through a bespoke voice-activated social media platform called 'The Circle'

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This edition follows the stories of people who have lived through tragedy and life-changing circumstances, exploring how they've overcome their loss and adapted to the new paths their lives have taken. Steve, 52, is rushed to St George's after falling over and hitting his head on a concrete step, while 21-year-old Fleur is assessed after she woke up with pain and swelling in her leg. Muffy, 72, is brought to Resus with slurred speech and weakness in her legs, and doctors suspect she may have suffered a stroke

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a mother-and-son team who have gone through 20 chefs in two years at their struggling Italian restaurant in California. The adjoining bar is a triumph, but the oldest dining establishment in town needs an overhaul if the inexperienced owners are to make a profit

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The double-team version of the popular dinner-party challenge arrives in Worthing and Portsmouth, where three more couples put their culinary skills to the test. First up are pensioner duo Bill and Hilary, who surprise everyone with their liberal attitudes. Next to host are children's entertainer Doug and his ever-tolerant partner Patsy, who combine fine dining with hippy sensibilities, and finally, 22-year-old hip-hop enthusiasts Micaela and Sanchez prepare a menu with a Jamaican-Filipino twist. With all the evenings complete, the contestants convene one more time to determine the winners

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: A no-nonsense Nigerian mum who raises her kids in a strict culture of respect swaps lives with an overwhelmed woman whose disconnected husband and spoilt children run the house

programme.title: The Supervet

Patricia brings her beloved 11-year-old Rhodesian ridgeback, Kwanda, to Fitzpatrick's Guildford hospital with an eye infection that she fears may be the sign of something more sinister. Dr Laurent Findji confirms it is bad news - a malignant tumour

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets a 17-year-old builder who has transformed a narrowboat into a floating holiday home, and a bride-to-be who has bought a disused burger van with the intention of turning it into a mobile bar for her wedding reception. George's Spanish tour continues with a visit to a snail-shaped house in the mountain valleys of Aragon

programme.title: Fifteen to One

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: In the last-ever episode of the comedy, Sam and Diane are plagued by doubts about the idea of getting back together, while rest of the regulars gang ponder the meaning of life

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane Chambers and her husband-to-be Sumner Sloan call in for a drink at a bar before setting off for their wedding. However, he decides to return to his ex-wife, so owner Sam Malone offers the jilted woman a job as a waitress. Starring Ted Danson and Shelley Long

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie finds her boss's four-year-old son has taken a shine to her, and Doug tries to spice things up for the unattractive shoe-girl at the bowling alley by doing a spot of flirting - but his good deed soon backfires. American comedy, starring Leah Remini and Kevin James

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Arthur grows jealous of a new dog on Holly's route, and Doug envies Carrie's close relationship with a gay colleague, deciding to spend more time with Deacon to get even with her. American comedy, starring Kevin James, Leah Remini and Jerry Stiller

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz tries everyone's patience by talking incessantly about her new love Roger, and Frasier offers to help protect Martin from a bullying boss. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part one of two. Peace and harmony are shattered by the arrival of Daphne's conniving mother and lecherous brother, and Frasier finds himself forced into playing host. Comedy, guest starring Anthony LaPaglia and Millicent Martin, with Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Tim battles to get a fence built for their marauding flock of 25 sheep, and Krys battles to balance the books. They race to get their chateau ready for their first paying guests as Lee struggles with a chandelier. Elaine and David continue the search for their dream property, visiting a 17th-century ex-priory in Normandy and taking on board all that Dick has taught them

programme.title: The Great House Giveaway
programme.desc: Nicole and Karl meet for the first time just before they step into the auction room to buy a terraced house in Oldbury. Presented by Simon O'Brien

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Couples from around Bristol and Bath, including Sam and his cabin crew wife Kelly, and bohemians Brian and Mandie, hope their dishes and hospitality will win them the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Max McMurdo and Simon O'Brien are in Woking, where they find a sidecar to be transformed into a boat and a water cylinder that Simon might make a trendy lamp

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Nick Hewer and Rachel Riley present the words-and-numbers game, with Konnie Huq joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jane and Martin want a holiday home in the town of Portimão in the Algarve - but Ben Hillman needs to find properties suitable not only for the couple but their beloved dog Bailey

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In France, a couple from Hull expand into the bouncy castle business, and in Spain juggling guests and rooms creates havoc at a B&B

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals arrive at Starshinezzz in County Durham, where laid-back host Dave Taylor hopes his renowned hospitality will make him a winner

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge force Bart to enrol in a military academy and Lisa unwisely follows him. Once in her own barracks she is snubbed by the other cadets - but receives unexpected help from Bart to tackle the assault course. Featuring the guest voice of Willem Dafoe

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is cast in the title role of Everyman, a superhero movie penned by Comic Book Guy, but struggles with the exercise and diet regimen required to get in shape for the part. With the guest voice of Seth Rogen

programme.desc: Sylver tries his best to ignore the online abuse Mercedes has been receiving. Meanwhile, Trish faces the wrath of Courtney

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.desc: Matt Lucas hosts as TV presenter Stacey Dooley, Little Mix's Jade Thirlwall, comedian Katherine Ryan and internet influencer KSI show off their baking skills. They serve up cocktail-flavoured fondant fancies, have their knowledge of pastry tested in the technical and in the showstopper are asked to create a scene showing something they cannot live without - all from biscuit and meringue. Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith judge their efforts

programme.title: Strangers Making Babies
programme.desc: Documentary following single women looking for platonic partners to have children with. Businesswoman Trinity from Essex originally wanted to raise a child on her own, until a health scare made her realise how important it is for a child to have two parents. She is matched with three potential partners. Nanny Venicia and amateur ballroom dancer Sarah also spend more time with the men they have been matched with. The time eventually comes to decide which potential dads-to-be they want to take to the next stage. But could romantic advances get in the way of a co-parenting partnership?

programme.title: The Circle
programme.desc: The latest twists and turns in the reality show which sees a number of individuals living in the same apartment block, but only communicating over social media. It's a game of popularity as they chat, flirt, play games and rate each other - with some playing as themselves, and others hiding behind a fake persona - with the winner walking off with £100,000

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: There's discord between contestants Charlotte Ritchie, Jamali Maddix, Lee Mack, Mike Wozniak and Sarah Kendall as rows erupt over facial hair and Jamali's driving skills. Taskmaster Greg Davies is likely pleased that his usual divide-and-conquer tactics are seemingly paying early dividends, as he watches Mike vaulting a high fence, Sarah wearing shoes on her knees, Charlotte grappling with static electricity and Lee struggling to see a balloon and a ghost. As usual, Alex Horne offers the intrepid contenders moral support

programme.title: The Crystal Maze
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade hosts the game show, inviting TV presenter Laura Whitmore, comedian Chris Ramsey, Diversity dancers Perri Kiely and Jordan Banjo, and former rugby player Gareth Thomas to take his hand and tackle a number of physical, skill, mystery and mental challenges. Their aim is to win the elusive crystals - and the more they get, the more time they get in the Crystal Dome

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits some of the restaurants that he set out to save, including The Mixing Bowl, The Olde Stone Mill, Peter's and Campania. Have their owners pulled themselves out of their nightmares?

programme.title: Goat (2016)
programme.desc: New college student Brad is desperate to fit into his new surroundings, so taking a cue from his older brother, he decides to pledge a fraternity. All goes well at first as he attends parties and meets several girls, but as he enters into the final stretch of the pledging ritual-known as hell week, Brad finds things taking a violent turn as he has to endure a series of brutal initiation rituals. Fact-based drama, with Ben Schnetzer and Nick Jonas

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: Rochelle Humes investigates the high rates of black women dying in pregnancy and childbirth. programme.desc: Alex Polizzi visits Horley near Gatwick to help Quasim, the owner, improve his ailing Surrey guesthouse. Alex can see the potential in Quasim's business, but curbing his expensive tastes to maximise profits turns out to be far from easy

programme.title: Britain's Great Cathedrals with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: The actor visits York Minster, which over the past 800 years, has been a backdrop to some of the most dramatic events in British history. It houses more than half of all the world's medieval glass, including the Rose Window, commissioned by Henry VIII, and the East Window, the largest stained glass window in the world. A succession of outspoken bishops of York have defied Nazis, married kings and queens, and more recently championed equality with Archbishop John Sentamu, the country's first black bishop, consecrating the world's first female bishop, Libby Lane, in 2014.

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Ann Maurice and Alistair Appleton help a Northamptonshire woman spruce up her country cottage in the village of Welton, hoping to entice a buyer to part with £250,000. programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted (2012)
programme.desc: The escaped zoo animals continue their quest to get back to their New York home. Having made it to Monte Carlo, they join a circus on a European tour as a means of travelling undetected - but an animal control agent is in hot pursuit. Animated comedy, with the voices of Ben Stiller, Chris Rock, David Schwimmer and Jada Pinkett Smith

programme.title: Baggage Claim (2013)
programme.desc: An air hostess is horrified at the thought of her younger sister getting married while she is still single. She realises her job gives her access to eligible men from across America, and begins clocking up thousands of air miles as she scours the country for a potential fiance. Romantic comedy, with Paula Patton and Taye Diggs

programme.title: Cutthroat Island (1995)
programme.desc: A tough female pirate enlists the help of an educated slave in finding the three parts of a map leading to buried treasure. However, one of the pieces is in the hands of her cruel uncle, and she also has to find the loot before her crew mutinies or the British Navy catches up with her. Swashbuckling adventure, starring Geena Davis, Matthew Modine, Frank Langella and Maury Chaykin

programme.title: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York (1992)
programme.desc: Hapless youngster Kevin somehow manages to catch the wrong plane and finds himself heading for New York, while his family jets off to Florida. Having got his hands on his father's credit card, he is enjoying the good life staying in a luxury hotel - until he bumps into two familiar burglars with an axe to grind. Comedy sequel, starring Macaulay Culkin, Joe Pesci, Daniel Stern, Brenda Fricker and Tim Curry

programme.title: The Equalizer (2014)
programme.desc: A retired secret agent applies his talents to the task of helping victims of injustice. When he witnesses a prostitute being beaten up by a pimp, he kills the man, an act that draws him into a battle to the death with a Russian crime syndicate. Action thriller based on the 1980s TV series, starring Denzel Washington and Chloe Grace Moretz

programme.title: God's Own Country (2017)
programme.desc: Young Yorkshire farmer Johnny Saxby numbs his frustrations with casual sex and alcohol. However, his life changes when he falls for a Romanian migrant worker during lambing season. Writer/director Francis Lee's drama, starring Josh O'Connor, Alec Secareanu and Gemma Jones

programme.title: Border (2018)
programme.desc: A customs officer who can smell fear develops an unusual attraction to a strange traveller while aiding a police investigation that will call into question her entire existence. Crime drama, starring Eva Melander, Eero Milonoff and Jörgen Thorsson. In Swedish

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: Six members of the deaf community share their stories of life in lockdown during the coronavirus outbreak

programme.title: The Man in the Iron Mask (1977)
programme.desc: The despotic king of France imprisons his identical twin and sees to it that he always wears a metal mask to avoid being identified, but musketeer D'Artagnan has a plan to restore the rightful heir to the throne. Swashbuckling adventure, based on the classic story by Alexandre Dumas, starring Richard Chamberlain in a dual role, with Patrick McGoohan, Louis Jourdan and Jenny Agutter

programme.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Long Haul (2017)
programme.desc: Youngster Greg Heffley hatches a plot to re-route a family road trip towards a videogame convention. Comedy sequel, starring Jason Drucker, Alicia Silverstone and Tom Everett Scott

programme.title: Ferdinand (2017)
programme.desc: After a bull with a big heart is mistaken for a dangerous beast, he is captured and torn from his home. Determined to return to his family, he rallies a misfit team on the ultimate adventure. Animated comedy, with the voices of John Cena, Kate McKinnon and Bobby Cannavale

programme.title: The Spiderwick Chronicles (2008)
programme.desc: Life for identical twins Jared and Simon and their sister Mallory begins afresh when their mother inherits a spooky mansion. But after moving in, strange things begin to happen, and as the youngsters investigate, they discover a book that opens up a mysterious world of amazing supernatural creatures. Fantasy adventure, starring Freddie Highmore in a dual role alongside Sarah Bolger and Nick Nolte

programme.title: Evolution (2001)
programme.desc: Two science teachers investigate a mysterious meteor and discover it is oozing a strange fluid containing millions of minuscule but rapidly evolving organisms - which start to turn into terrifying alien monsters with a taste for human flesh. Sci-fi comedy, starring David Duchovny, Orlando Jones, Julianne Moore, Seann William Scott, Dan Aykroyd and Ted Levine

programme.title: The Hitman's Bodyguard (2017)
programme.desc: A disgraced bodyguard is hired to protect a hitman about to testify against the tyrannical president of Belarus at the International Criminal Court in exchange for the release of his wife from prison. Comedy action thriller, starring Ryan Reynolds, Samuel L Jackson, Gary Oldman and Salma Hayek

programme.title: Hunt for the Wilderpeople (2016)
programme.desc: A 12-year-old brought up in the city is sent to be fostered by the good-natured Bella and her grumpy husband Hec, who live on a farm in rural New Zealand. When tragedy strikes. Ricky runs off into the wilderness, pursued by Hec - inadvertently sparking a national manhunt for the two of them. Comedy adventure written and directed by Taika Waititi, starring Sam Neill and Julian Dennison

programme.title: Dodgeball: A True Underdog Story (2004)
programme.desc: The struggling owner of a run-down gym is forced to take drastic action to prevent an arrogant fitness guru buying the business out from under him - and enlists his customers to form a dodgeball team in the hope of triumphing in the US championships. Sporting comedy, starring Ben Stiller, Vince Vaughn and Christine Taylor

programme.title: Mary and the Witch's Flower (2017)
programme.desc: A strange flower grants a girl magic powers. Animated adventure based on The Little Broomstick by Mary Stewart, featuring the voices of Kate Winslet and Jim Broadbent. Dubbed in English

programme.title: Shrek the Third (2007)
programme.desc: The bad-tempered ogre finds himself in the unwelcome position of being next in line for the throne. Preferring to stay at home in the swamps, he sets out on a quest to find the rightful heir - a rebellious teenager named Artie - and persuade him to face up to his responsibilities as the future king. Meanwhile, the ambitious Prince Charming sees his chance to take the throne. Animated comedy, with the voices of Mike Myers, Cameron Diaz, Justin Timberlake, Eddie Murphy, Antonio Banderas and Rupert Everett

programme.title: Megamind (2010)
programme.desc: An evil genius finally succeeds in killing the superhero who has foiled his every evil scheme, but finds life without an enemy boring. To fill the gap, he transforms an ordinary man into a worthy adversary - but when his creation turns evil, it falls to the villain to save the world. Animated comedy, with the voices of Will Ferrell, Tina Fey and Brad Pitt

programme.title: Monster Trucks (2016)
programme.desc: A drilling operation unleashes a subterranean creature which feeds on oil. The monster bonds with a monster truck which a local teenager is building from spare parts, and the youngster befriends the beast and helps it to return to its underground home. Fantasy adventure, starring Lucas Till and Jane Levy

programme.title: Keeping Up with the Joneses (2016)
programme.desc: A suburban couple become embroiled in an international espionage plot when they discover that their seemingly perfect new neighbours are actually government spies. Action comedy, starring Zach Galifianakis, Isla Fisher, Jon Hamm and Gal Gadot

programme.title: Bumblebee (2018)
programme.desc: In 1987, Californian teenager Charlie Watson is traumatised by the death of her father, while her mother Sally and new boyfriend Ron leaves her feeling even more alone. For her 18th-birthday she's given a yellow Volkswagen Beetle, which turns out to be the battle-scarred Autobot Bumblebee. Transformers prequel, starring Hailee Steinfeld, John Cena and Jorge Lendeborg Jr

programme.title: Mary Magdalene (2018)
programme.desc: In 33AD, when Judea is under the control of the Roman Empire, a woman named Mary from the town of Magdala begins to follow Jesus of Nazareth, causing conflict with the male disciples, including Saint Peter. Drama, starring Rooney Mara, Joaquin Phoenix and Chiwetel Ejiofor

programme.title: Before I Go to Sleep (2014)
programme.desc: A woman who cannot retain her memories following a traumatic accident is contacted by a mysterious neuropsychologist, who offers to help her recover the truth about her condition. As she tries to piece together the events of her past, she begins to fear neither her husband nor the doctor are who they seem to be. Thriller, starring Nicole Kidman, Colin Firth and Mark Strong

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Omnibus. Warren is desperate to prove his innocence when someone tries to frame him for a crime he did not commit, while Summer decides to change tactics by befriending Sienna

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the conclusion of Gordon Ramsay's visit to La Galleria 33 in Boston, Massachusetts, he confronts sisters Rita and Lisa with an ultimatum, and finds himself stuck in a war between the waiters, chefs and owners over who is to blame for the Italian restaurant's failings

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Brooklyn, New York, to tackle a 55-year-old family business. Owner John Esposito left school at the age of 14 and has worked at his parents' restaurant, Sal's Pizzeria, ever since. Their success meant they could afford to purchase the location next door in the 1990s, naming it Mama Maria after John's mother, who died in 2002. But when he lost his father as well, John became overwhelmed by the responsibility of running both establishments and his livelihood is at risk

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Wilkinsburg in Pennsylvania, home to Ms Jean's Southern Cuisine, which was opened by retired special-education teacher Jean Gould. During the chef's attempt to save the business from disaster, he discovers her soul-food restaurant resembles a dentist's waiting room and finds a lot of tension between Jean and her employees, who claim she is a Jekyll-and-Hyde character

programme.title: A Dog's Purpose (2017)
programme.desc: A dog is reincarnated as different breeds over several generations, with multiple owners and with a variety of names, but he is fated to be reacquainted, decades later, with his original owner. Comedy drama, starring Dennis Quaid, with the voice of Josh Gad

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj's sister Priya visits the gang, causing tension when Leonard tries to cover up the fling he once had with her. After discovering his friend's secret, Sheldon struggles to keep quiet, leading the guys to reveal information they have all been keeping from one another

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard vows to be more self-assured around women, believing his problem attracting a girlfriend stems from a lack of confidence. An FBI agent interviews the gang to assess Howard's suitability for a team working on a new surveillance satellite. Guest starring Eliza Dushku

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends set up camp outside a cinema to get tickets for a new cut of Raiders of the Lost Ark - but find themselves resuming hostilities with Sheldon's old foe Wil Wheaton, the former Star Trek: The Next Generation actor. Meanwhile, Penny and Bernadette invite Amy to a sleepover

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny's father pays a visit and Leonard discovers she told her parents they were back together, so he plays his boyfriend role to the hilt - much to her dismay. Meanwhile, Raj gets drunk and makes a pass at Howard's girlfriend Bernadette. Guest starring Keith Carradine

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy finds she has romantic feelings for Penny's former boyfriend Zack, while Raj and Howard begin competing to prove which of them would make the better superhero. Comedy, guest starring Brian Thomas Smith

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys have fun at the expense of Penny's boyfriend Zack, but later try to make amends by enlisting his help with the New Year's costume competition at the comic-book store. Comedy, starring Kaley Cuoco and Simon Helberg

programme.title: Gogglesprogs
programme.desc: Young TV viewers give their honest, inimitable and hilarious take on This Morning and Doctor Who, and sing along to The Sound of Music

programme.title: Teen First Dates
programme.desc: A-level student Genevieve is desperate to make a good impression on her first-ever date, while Sonny is eager to meet a girl who shares his passion for all things 1970s

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen (2009)
programme.desc: The war between the shape-shifting robots erupts once again, as the first of the evil Decepticons leads an attack on Earth to locate an ancient planet-destroying machine. Hapless teenager Sam Witwicky is caught in the middle of the ensuing conflict as he holds the key to discovering the location of the device. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Shia LaBeouf and Megan Fox

programme.title: X-Men: Days of Future Past (2014)
programme.desc: In a future ravaged by war, the superhero team makes a desperate last stand against a force of deadly robots. Their only hope is to send Wolverine back in time to the 1970s, to join forces with an earlier version of the X-Men and change the events that started the conflict. Superhero adventure sequel uniting the casts of the original movie and prequel First Class, starring Hugh Jackman, Jennifer Lawrence, James McAvoy and Michael Fassbender

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: There's discord between contestants Charlotte Ritchie, Jamali Maddix, Lee Mack, Mike Wozniak and Sarah Kendall as rows erupt over facial hair and Jamali's driving skills. Taskmaster Greg Davies is likely pleased that his usual divide-and-conquer tactics are seemingly paying early dividends, as he watches Mike vaulting a high fence, Sarah wearing shoes on her knees, Charlotte grappling with static electricity and Lee struggling to see a balloon and a ghost. As usual, Alex Horne offers the intrepid contenders moral support

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on TV from the first week of September 2017, featuring The Great British Bake Off, Doctor Foster, The X Factor, The Crystal Maze, Mountain: Life at the Extreme, Cheap Cheap Cheap and the news

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they watched during October 2017, including Strictly Come Dancing, The X Factor, Britain by Bike with Larry and George Lamb, Gordon Ramsay on Cocaine and Hillary Clinton's appearance on The One Show

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard's ingenious idea for a new smartphone app puts pressure on his friendship with Sheldon, who vies with him for control of the project. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tension mounts when the pals attend a weekend science conference. Howard becomes argumentative after Bernadette runs into a former boyfriend, and the fallout causes chaos with the hotel room arrangements. Rick Fox guest stars, with Simon Helberg and Melissa Rauch

programme.desc: Omnibus. Warren is desperate to prove his innocence when someone tries to frame him for a crime he did not commit, while Summer decides to change tactics by befriending Sienna

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Le Bistro in Lighthouse Point, Florida, where the stubborn chef and owner has lost his passion for cooking. The visiting expert hopes to help, but his criticisms are not well received, causing tempers to flare

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Dre brings everyone together for a rowdy family game night and the competition is fierce. As the evening progresses, alliances are formed and some are pushed to their limits. Meanwhile, Rainbow makes it clear how she feels about Andre Jr's girlfriend

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: An incident at school threatens Andre Jr's future at his beloved Valley Glen Prep, leaving Dre and Rainbow in a quandary about their oldest son's education

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben offers to dog-sit for his girlfriend Megan, but the animal does not seem to like him much. Elsewhere, Tucker is angered by his room-mates' messy habits, so Danny hires someone to clean the apartment. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben persuades Bonnie and Ray to invite his conservative Aunt Betty to Emma's baptism in the hope she will give the baby a generous gift, but this means hiding Ray's sexuality from her. Meanwhile, Riley makes Tucker and Danny compete to be chosen as the godfather

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tensions between Sheldon and Penny reach a new high after a paintballing accident leaves an ugly stain on the awkward physicist's favourite sofa cushion. Meanwhile, romance blossoms between Leslie and Howard. Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon, Howard and Raj discover actress Summer Glau is on their train while travelling to San Francisco. Desperate to discuss the Terminator TV series with her, the friends devise a number of plans to engage her in conversation. With Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Simon Helberg and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam worries about being 'hazed' by the older students when he goes to high school, but he soon earns their respect by body-slamming Barry. Erica and her friends talk about what they are going to put into their school-time capsule

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam works on a new persona that he hopes will make him seem cool on his first day at high school. Beverly gets her teaching certificate and aims to work as a substitute teacher at her children's school, but things go awry and the kids end up in a Saturday detention. But after Murray pays a visit to the school, everyone learns an important lesson. Tim Meadows and Allie Grant guest star

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle's new girlfriend gives his self-confidence a boost, but Peralta is forced to intervene before his colleague gets too serious, too soon in the relationship. Meanwhile, Diaz and Santiago have trouble taking a costumed crimefighter seriously, and Holt faces a challenge to his leadership

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta is in danger of losing his flat but has no money to buy his own place, so Gina does her best to find him a new home. Holt and Jeffords organise self-evaluations for all the staff at the precinct, while Boyle helps Diaz to take revenge on one of the weekend squad officers who always makes a mess of her desk

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Comic-book store owner Stuart asks Amy out on a date, forcing a jealous Sheldon to consider the future of his relationship with her. Meanwhile, the scientists become obsessed with an unusual new card game, and Penny organises a round of Twister. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Mayim Bialik

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard confronts the man who tormented him in high school, while Penny realises she did her fair share of bullying in the past and calls the people she targeted to apologise. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tensions between Sheldon and Penny reach a new high after a paintballing accident leaves an ugly stain on the awkward physicist's favourite sofa cushion. Meanwhile, romance blossoms between Leslie and Howard. Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly talks Erica into writing a Hanukkah song for the school holiday concert, inspiring Barry to prove his own musical prowess. Adam discovers that the things he loved as a child aren't always as good as he remembers. Ana Gasteyer (Suburgatory) guest stars

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly hopes to inspire the students when she takes over as substitute teacher in Barry's chemistry class. Adam accidentally embarrasses Emmy when he is forced to read out a note about her in class, so he enlists Erica's help to become a better friend. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When an Internal Affairs investigator reveals there may be a mole in the precinct, Peralta and Holt must find out who it is before Deputy Chief Wuntch gets wind of the situation. Jeffords and Diaz visit a silent disco to uncover leads for their new drug task force

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta hits it off with Sophia, a woman he meets in a bar, only to find out she is the defence attorney representing a perpetrator he is trying to put behind bars. Diaz pressures Santiago to stand as a union rep, while Gina and Boyle try to move on from their relationship. Eva Longoria (best known as Desperate Housewives' Gaby) joins the cast

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Dean faces Tracey's parents and tells them of his betrayal. Gabrielle's decision to stay in a rental apartment instead of her home proves disastrous when Nasser refuses to move in

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny buys Leonard and Sheldon some Star Trek action figures, but the duo refuse to remove them from the packaging in case their value is diminished. Elsewhere, Raj is desperate to find someone to accompany him to a wedding and asks his parents to find him a date. Featuring the guest voice of Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard is put in charge of looking after Stephen Hawking's wheelchair when the famous scientist comes to lecture at the university for a week - and takes advantage of his position to blackmail Sheldon into performing assorted unpleasant tasks. Guest starring Stephen Hawking

programme.title: Baby Daddy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny starts her own hair accessories business and the orders start to pile in. However, she makes the mistake of asking Sheldon to help, leading to frustration and regret. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

Comedy, starring Kaley Cuoco, Valerie Azlynn, Johnny Galecki and Simon Helberg
