programme.title: Rich Kids, Skint Holiday
programme.desc: Privileged 19-year-old Harry has no experience with children, but manages to build a bond with eight-year-old Connor and the Clifford family on a caravan park in the New Forest. Mum Kate challenges Harry to plan a day's activities for £20

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Cleaning duo Jon and Brennan take on some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes. Mum-of-three Geraldine is overwhelmed by a sea of clutter in her three-bedroom house

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A furious landlord discovers his tenant has been subletting his exclusive north-west London flat - having not paid any rent for months. In Woolwich, squatters with a baby are given two weeks to find somewhere new to live, while a High Court enforcement officer helps an Essex grandmother evict her non-paying tenants in Dagenham

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Documentary about the horrors of the rental market including a landlord who decided to sell his east London flat so he could afford a property with his girlfriend. But when he told his tenant, things quickly turned sour and the man stopped paying rent and refused to leave. Plus, the story of a pub owner in Lincolnshire trying to evict his tenant, having rented it 10 years ago on a 'gentleman's handshake'. Now, however, he is owed a staggering £40,000 in unpaid rent

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Ben try to drill through the locks on a property to evict the residents, only to find to their surprise that the door has been modified with special reinforced metal. Delroy and Brian try to reclaim money a garage owes to a customer and are shocked by the condition of the vehicle in question, and a woman who has acted as guarantor for her sister's tenancy does not realise the extent of her responsibilities

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A special edition looking at the police dog teams in the Cleveland and Durham specialist operations unit. Cameras observe the highly trained animals and their handlers in training and in action as the documentary reveals the endearing bonds the hounds develop with their masters. Drawing on new stories as well as archive footage, this programme showcases the vital role the dog unit plays in collaring criminals within the region

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Rookie team member Rachael faces a baptism of fire on a night shift, from a face-off with a driver threatening her colleague Lee's family, to the pursuit of a high-speed Mercedes carrying with a pregnant passenger. Elsewhere, Liam plays a pitch-black game of hunt the knife in the aftermath of a terrifying armed robbery, dog handler Mo deals with a double fire before arresting a man who appears to be stealing from a phone box, and a motorist picks up the phone and calls the police to report interceptor Chris for stealing his car

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A failure to stop in Hartlepool turns into an armed stand-off and a full-blown kidnapping situation, while a 14-year-old boy is found in possession of a bag of crack cocaine, cash and a knife. Lee goes on a high-speed pursuit through Stockton, and Jacko and Simon tackle a drug driver who is wearing a balaclava

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court Enforcement agents evict a large group of squatters barricaded into a disused nursery in London, and have to resort to smashing their way in as they refuse to leave. Meanwhile, agents in Bristol try to recover over £10,000 owed by a plumbing business to a supplier, and emotions run high when they attempt to evict a tenant who pleads her innocence in west London

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: An episode combining new and unforgettable past cases. The High Court Enforcement Agents head to Manchester to track down over £5,000-worth of debt, and seize an expensive car in the process. Later in south London, the agents deal with a violent debtor who threatens them with a concealed weapon, and in Liverpool, they are met with lies and aggression from a mechanic who owes nearly £3,000

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Brent's attitude has changed, to David and Aaron's surprise, and Harlow finds him a lot more attractive as well. Nicolette tries to clear her name regarding Fay's will

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Roo chases down Alf after he did not shake John's hand. Following Jasmine and Lewis's kiss, they are both a bit flustered. Leah and Justin jump at the chance for time alone

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: In Dorset, property developer Claire Donovan and her family swap homes and lives with warehouse worker Jason White and his clan. The Donovans live in a six-bedroom farmhouse with six acres and a swimming pool in the countryside, while the Whites rent a narrow two-bedroom railway cottage in Blandford

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall comes to the aid of a German Shepherd working as a security dog at a nightclub, who gets confused about who exactly he is supposed to protect the business against. Other clients include a labradoodle who objects to her owners doing any housework and a dispute between the dogs belonging to two generations of the same family

programme.title: Diana: The Interview That Shocked the World
programme.desc: A look back at one of the most memorable moments in TV history, when Diana, Princess of Wales, was interviewed by Panorama reporter Martin Bashir. Diana candidly opened up about her marriage to Prince Charles and her life as a member of the royal family, in a programme that drew an audience of 22.8million people in the UK. With testimony from both BBC insiders and some of those closest to Diana, the programme uncovers why the Princess chose to take this extraordinary gamble and reveal how Bashir - then a comparatively unknown BBC outsider - came to gain her trust

programme.title: Fergie & Andrew: The Duke & Duchess of Disaster
programme.desc: Documentary examining the scandals that have surrounded Prince Andrew and Sarah Ferguson since their marriage in 1986 and subsequent divorce. The programme examines the succession of PR gaffes and undercover tabloid stings that followed in the Duchess of York's wake once she was no longer part of the royal family, as well as looking into the prince's friendship with convicted paedophile Jeffrey Epstein

programme.title: Adults Only
programme.desc: A revealing insight into some couples who are keen to spice up their sex lives by seeking another person to join them in a sexual relationship

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: A man who fell through a window has a phobia of needles, which leads him to refuse any kind of pain relief and even attempt to discharge himself before his injuries are treated. An aggressive patient is brought in by four police officers after smashing up his mother's home, and has to undergo a toxicology test. Dr Audrey Fox tries to save the life of a patient who has overdosed, and a woman suffers a head injury after slipping on a slice of pizza her husband had left on the floor for their dog to eat

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: A driver is trapped in his car after it careered out of control, smashing into a wall before flipping sideways onto a driveway. Dr Polly Haywood and critical care paramedic Sarah Folley are sent to the scene

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Brent's attitude has changed, to David and Aaron's surprise, and Harlow finds him a lot more attractive as well. Nicolette tries to clear her name regarding Fay's will

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Roo chases down Alf after he did not shake John's hand. Following Jasmine and Lewis's kiss, they are both a bit flustered. Leah and Justin jump at the chance for time alone

programme.title: Rich Kids, Skint Holiday
programme.desc: On a trip to Bridlington with the Spink family, wannabe rock star Jordan struggles to fold his own trousers or open a can of peas, but he also learns that despite their troubles, the cash-strapped Spinks are much closer than his own wealthy family

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Cleaning duo Richard and Brennan take on some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes. They begin with Lincolnshire single mum, Sam, who has dedicated her life to caring for her disabled daughter, leaving no time for cleaning

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Brent Council officers find a severely overcrowded house in north London, while Harrow Council try to help a family forced to sleep in a single room due to leaks coming from the roof. Their landlord is reluctant to complete the work and has instead served them with an eviction notice. Plus, the case of a Birmingham landlord who wants rid of his troublesome tenants, who have not paid rent for more than a year

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: In north London, Harrow council officers investigate an overcrowded property. An inspection uncovers many issues, including an unauthorised loft conversion that is a danger to the tenants who sleep there. A couple in Suffolk agree to rent a property to its former owner, who now refuses to leave, and a single mum tricks her way into a Milton Keynes property, confirming she has paid the deposit having done no such thing

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: An episode combining new and unforgettable past cases. The High Court Enforcement Agents head to Manchester to track down over £5,000-worth of debt, and seize an expensive car in the process. Later in south London, the agents deal with a violent debtor who threatens them with a concealed weapon, and in Liverpool, they are met with lies and aggression from a mechanic who owes nearly £3,000

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: AJ and Richie are in pursuit of a van speeding through narrow country lanes, while Jacko and the team box in a van carrying large quantities of cannabis. Sparks fly when dog handler Justin and police dog Elsa capture two burglars on a building site

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Liam and Ben attempt to catch a gang of late-night burglars, but one of the suspects treats an officer to a face full of saliva, while Jacko and Simon are in pursuit of a car round the streets of Ferryhill, but it's not the interceptors who make the arrest. Meanwhile, Spike tails two suspected burglars in an unmarked car before making a back-street stop and Liam's sniffer dog Louie uncovers large amounts of cash and drugs following an armed raid

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Runaway drivers are convinced to stop by the threat of 50,000 volts, a suspected drink-driver resists arrest and receives a face full of incapacitating PAVA spray, a fresh-faced and uninsured motorist tries to pass himself off as his 52-year-old father

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Vic become party to a fractured family's school fee woes in Staffordshire and Del and Dael need to reclaim £3,500 after a rental van was returned badly damaged. Stewart and Elmor are in Warwickshire, where the members of a household blame their predicament on a scheming landlord whose subsequent arrival sparks a fierce reaction, while Iain helps Stewart remove a young mother from her Lancashire home

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The agents chase almost £3,000 owed by Indian takeaway owners, but when the staff deny any knowledge of the debt, the agents threaten to seize kitchen equipment. In east London they face a race against time to recover more than £8,000 from an electrical services company, and in Cheshire the enforcement agents chase nearly £4,000 of debt owed by a mobile phone shop

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Harlow is caught between her affection for Brent and Paul. Meanwhile, Susan does not know what do with Finn's video diaries, before taking advice from David

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Amber struggles to find a home for her and Jai, Ziggy suspects Amber might run off again. Martha cannot handle everyone preying on her, and asks for some solitude

programme.title: Britain's Parking Hell
programme.desc: In Weston-super-Mare, new restrictions have provoked mixed reactions, while an angry parker and his brother turn the air blue in Edinburgh as they try to find a space for Burns Night. A bodybuilder enrages his girlfriend and angry parents by parking in a parent-and-child space, arguing he is too big to squeeze out of his car in a standard bay

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Nick Wallis examines how CCTV and helicopter cameras mean wrongdoers can no longer hide in a crowd. He highlights the use of such footage to help seal the conviction of a man involved in the August 2011 riots across England, and reports on a state-of-the-art network monitoring a football crowd of 21,000 as Leicester City take on Barnsley

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: A 19-year-old woman comes to Hull Royal Infirmary after falling off a barstool in a pub and landing on her little finger, while a 53-year-old man arrives after blacking out and falling down a flight of stairs in his block of flats. Meanwhile, staff deal with a 34-year-old who has been thrown off his motocross bike in a race and has fractured and dislocated both shoulders

programme.title: 999: Critical Condition
programme.desc: A man with a torn aorta, the main artery in the body, needs urgent medical attention to prevent catastrophic internal bleeding. Meanwhile, a patient is flown into the hospital by helicopter after being involved in a major car accident, and another man is brought in and treated after falling through a skylight in a roof

programme.title: Scream 2 (1997)
programme.desc: A second serial killer adopts the ghost mask and embarks on a campaign of murder, while survivors of the first massacre try to get to the bottom of the terrifying mystery. Wes Craven's horror sequel, starring Neve Campbell, Courteney Cox, David Arquette, Sarah Michelle Gellar, Jada Pinkett Smith and Jamie Kennedy

programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Scream 2 (1997)

Wes Craven's horror sequel, starring Neve Campbell, Courteney Cox, David Arquette, Sarah Michelle Gellar, Jada Pinkett Smith and Jamie Kennedy

programme.title: Me & My 10 Kids: Mega Families
programme.desc: On a remote seaside village on the coast of Scotland live the Sullivans and their clan of ten. Today is back to school which means running a tight ship to get lunches ready so mum and Dad divide and conquer. Mum takes on bathroom duty upstairs whilst Dad inspects the troops as they head out of the door. By 8:30 mum Emma already feels like she's had a packed day! In Whitstable, Kent the Gale family and their ten kids are proving to be the most popular family on the street when they decide to put up their very own inflatable castle. But it soon descends into chaos as kids and adults get stuck in! In Southampton lives single-mum Sonya and her mega-brood of ten kids. To ease the pressure on her workload Sonya is passing on her culinary skills to eldest daughter Shannon but despite the 17 year old's attempts to stick to the recipe even the delights of a spag bol is not going to keep all of the troops happy. And in Wales the Holloway-Scotts and their ten kids have to prepare for Olivia's pro

programme.title: Cats and Dogs at War
programme.desc: Nanci and Chirag face their biggest challenge yet with two households where there is real fear that recently arrived big dogs could injure the resident cats

programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Columbo: Negative Reaction (1974)
programme.desc: A successful photographer wants to get rid of his nagging wife so he can pursue an affair with his assistant. He murders his spouse and makes it look as if she was killed by a kidnapper, and at the same time puts an ex-con in the frame. However, the dogged detective sees through his ruse and proceeds to pick the story to pieces. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Dick Van Dyke, Don Gordon and Antoinette Bower

programme.title: Columbo: Now You See Him (1976)
programme.desc: A stage magician has kept the fact that he is a Nazi war criminal a secret for years. When a nightclub manager threatens to expose him, the illusionist kills him and arranges the perfect alibi - because at the time of the murder, he was apparently performing an escapology act. However, Columbo sets out to uncover the truth. Detective drama, with Peter Falk and Jack Cassidy

programme.title: Columbo Goes to College (1991)
programme.desc: Two criminology students murder their professor and cover their tracks with false clues. They think they are on the way to outwitting everyone - but find themselves at the bottom of the class when Columbo intervenes. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Stephen Caffrey, Gary Hershberger and Robert Culp

programme.title: Columbo: Murder - A Self Portrait (1989)
programme.desc: A possessive painter who fears his ex-wife will expose his dark secrets resorts to killing her, but makes it appear she drowned. However, Columbo is unconvinced and draws on his broad palette of experience to reveal the truth. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Patrick Bauchau and Fionnula Flanagan

programme.title: Columbo: Any Old Port in a Storm (1973)
programme.desc: A vineyard owner's financial security is jeopardised when his playboy younger brother threatens to sell the family winery. He resorts to killing his sibling and rigging the death scene to look like a scuba-diving accident. However, the crumpled cop sees through the ruse and in the process reveals he is something of a wine buff himself. Detective drama, with Peter Falk, Donald Pleasence and Julie Harris

programme.title: Columbo: Ashes to Ashes (1998)
programme.desc: The shabby sleuth investigates the complex case of a murdered Hollywood gossip writer. He uses his unique talents to interrogate a smooth-talking funeral director, who was once romantically involved with the victim and one of the last people to see her alive. Detective drama, with Peter Falk. Patrick McGoohan co-stars and directs

programme.title: Columbo Likes the Nightlife (2003)
programme.desc: The disheveled cop is drawn into the world of the Los Angeles club scene when he investigates the apparent suicide of a tabloid reporter, and uncovers evidence of a blackmail plot. Detective drama, with Peter Falk, Matthew Rhys and Jennifer Sky

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A right-wing public speaker is raped after one of her public appearances is disrupted by a protest

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When an infant goes missing, detectives take sides in the family's right-to-die court case and Barba's interference in the case puts the whole DA's office in jeopardy. Drama, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part one of two. Ziva confronts her past when the team is ordered to protect her father, Mossad director Eli David, at a gathering of former heads of NCIS. The agents discover he is being targeted by terrorists who have hijacked a shipment of advanced weapons from the army. Drama, guest starring TJ Ramini and Michael Nouri, with Cote de Pablo and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: A failed jewellery store robbery results in a murder that results in three coins being retrieved from a dead thief's stomach. It seems that the coins have an unsettling effect on whoever possesses them, and Hank and Captain Renard soon begin to exhibit unusual behaviour. Elsewhere, an old friend of Aunt Marie's comes to Nick with information about the circumstances of his parents' death. Fantasy drama, starring Russell Hornsby

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick searches for a dragon-like monster that has killed two men in a warehouse with its fiery breath, but finds himself having to fend off the seductive advances of the creature's manipulative daughter. Fantasy drama, starring Russell Hornsby, with Danielle Panabaker

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces across the country to reveal how CCTV and technological advances are helping to ensure convictions against shoplifters. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.desc: A small-town lawyer asks Jason to help him pursue a class action suit against his home's biggest employer, who has been blamed for an outbreak of a debilitating illness

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part two of two. The safe house is attacked, leaving Vance in hospital and Eli missing, with his bodyguard Amit Hadar dead. The movements of all the Palestinians are accounted for at the time of the attack, making it unclear who was responsible, and Ziva suspects her Mossad replacement Liat is hiding something. Drama, starring Michael Nouri, Cote de Pablo, Rocky Carroll and Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Navy officer scheduled to testify in a forthcoming murder trial goes missing after receiving a threat at the safe house where he was staying, and the deputy district attorney asks the NCIS agents to locate him. One of their few leads is a dead turkey Tony and McGee find in the man's fridge, so they take it to Ducky for an autopsy. Crime drama, starring Sean Murray and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the double murder of a wealthy man and his daughter, and the evidence leads them to suspect the wife and stepmother of the deceased are guilty

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A girl is killed in a crime displaying all the hallmarks of white supremacists who recruit teenagers to carry out acts of violence, and the team races to bring the ringleader to justice before more youngsters are butchered. Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives respond to a hold-up committed by a bloodthirsty team of robbers in ski-masks, and McCoy struggles to determine whether the teenage tearaway found with the criminals was an unwilling hostage or a active participant in the crimes

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the case of a college professor pushed under a subway train - and the subsequent investigation leads to a man who had kidnapped his children and changed his identity 15 years earlier. Drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A respected financial analyst dies from an overdose of Viagra, a drug he was advised not to take. The subsequent investigation uncovers foul play involving his mistress (guest star Julia Roberts) and an unscrupulous tycoon, whose attorneys thwart McCoy and Carmichael's attempts to prosecute. Drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A hidden anti-Semitic message in a high-school yearbook offers an insight into the murder of an art teacher, and the subsequent case leads McCoy into conflict with 'Klan lawyer' Roy Payne

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The agents investigate the murder of a marine during a cruise. They discover he came from a famous and wealthy family but had turned his back on a life of privilege to join the military, and after the death of his father had inherited a large part of his business. His decision to change his will may have pushed one of his relatives to kill him to keep the firm in their control. Crime drama, guest-starring Diane Neal (Law & Order: Special Victims Unit)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A US Navy recruitment officer is murdered at a high school and the agents discover he had recently begun a relationship with a married teacher whose wife held a grudge against him. They also find out a student's father was vehemently opposed to his joining the military, and receive help from an unexpected quarter - Ducky's esteemed predecessor, Dr Magnus. Crime drama, guest starring comedian Bob Newhart

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A former serviceman who had been having an affair is beaten to death in his own back garden, and the agents are forced to consider the possibility that his wife - a US Marine and martial arts expert - is the killer. Meanwhile, McGee becomes the subject of an embarrassing mix-up when an inflatable doll apparently purchased on his credit card is delivered. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team's holiday plans are put on hold when a murder investigation leads to the discovery of a newborn baby who has no identification and no apparent ties to a family. Mark Harmon and Sean Murray star

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the death of a banker in a fire at his office. Discovering the sprinklers were disabled, Goren and Eames suspect arson. They track down the man who started the blaze - but he is killed while resisting arrest, leaving them with no clues as to who hired him. Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan star

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A doctor who works at an abortion clinic is shot in his apartment by a sniper, convincing the detectives a pro-life activist is to blame. An elderly couple who have chained themselves to a radiator in protest at the clinic's activities help the team, who face a race against time to catch the killer

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A person dressed in a clown costume murders a bakery owner. The evidence leads to a man from Flack's past who reluctantly agreed to join the witness protection programme to testify against drug dealers. Crime drama, starring Eddie Cahill

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Jo investigate the death of a Spanish club promoter and are surprised to find a police officer from Barcelona at the crime scene. They realise that, for diplomatic reasons, he is allowed to be there - until Mac discovers he is withholding information about the case. As the investigation proceeds, however, the New York detectives begin to suspect they are dealing with something other than a straightforward homicide. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick investigates a theft and murder at a spice shop and discovers that the thieves were lizard-like creatures seeking a dangerous drug. Renard orders Adalind to seduce Hank using a love potion concealed in some biscuits

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick takes Juliette for a weekend away in the country, planning to propose - only to encounter a seemingly normal rustic couple who are not what they seem. Romance is also in the air for Hank and Monroe, who each find themselves on the brink of new relationships

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis re-examine a case closed since the 1960s after a vehicle containing the remains of a murdered man is dredged up from the Hudson River. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis examine the murder of a popular Harlem community leader, while McCoy and Carmichael struggle to prevent a chaotic situation. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston, Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives respond to a hold-up committed by a bloodthirsty team of robbers in ski-masks, and McCoy struggles to determine whether the teenage tearaway found with the criminals was an unwilling hostage or a active participant in the crimes

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A sound-system installer is murdered after supplying goods to a strip club covertly operated by the Mafia, and the finger of blame points to a small-time hoodlum whose crime boss father is serving life imprisonment. The case eventually comes to trial - but investigators are disturbed to hear an untrustworthy government attorney is handling the prosecution. Drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A pregnant student is found murdered, and detectives Briscoe and Curtis discover she was strangled to death before being stabbed by the killer in an effort to make the attack seem like the random act of a psychopath. A mathematics professor soon comes under suspicion as eyewitnesses allege he was close to the crime scene on the night in question

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis uncover new evidence as they investigate a 30-year-old rape and stabbing case, but the victim is consumed with fear when confronted with the possibility of another trial for the perpetrator

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The agents are forced to undergo psychological evaluations conducted by Dr Rachel Cranston (guest star Wendy Makkena) while investigating the death of a submarine's commanding officer. Suspicion falls on a journalist seen arguing with the man before his demise, and Tony discovers a link between the psychotherapist shadowing the agents and Ziva's predecessor Kate Todd. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine dies while saving the life of a foreign defence secretary, who was the target of an assassination attempt. Gibbs and the team are given the task of protecting the politician's daughter while she studies in America, but fail to stop her being kidnapped and ransomed in a bid to prevent her father signing an important treaty. Crime drama, starring Sean Murray and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine's teeth and fingertips are found in a pickpocket's stolen purse, and Ducky discovers he had been tortured on a rack before dying. The agents realise he may have been killed in error, and that the real target was his ex-girlfriend, a skilled player of computer games who unwittingly uncovered a mysterious code. Crime drama, starring Michael Weatherly and Sean Murray

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames are led to a terminally ill bank robber after a man is blown up by what he thought was a fake bomb. The pair discover the crook is planning to take both his own life and that of the accomplice he has enlisted to assist him with his final heist. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate the case of a heart surgeon murdered during his son's bar mitzvah. Although they initially suspect someone with Mob connections, the detectives later discover another man's obsession puts him in the frame for the killing. Drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The father of a wealthy socialite is found dead after threatening to cause problems for the owner of his daughter's favourite nightspot. The club owner seems a likely suspect, but all is not what it seems - he is actually an FBI agent involved in an undercover operation. Starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The investigators find three bodies when they arrive at the scene of an accident involving a truck full of revellers, and find a lead when one of the dead is identified as the daughter of an unpopular trade-union boss. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise, Carmine Giovinazzo and Hill Harper

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigates a series of shootings at a nightclub, where a bartender and two patrons were killed by a hitman, who then proceeded to kidnap someone. Hawes is stunned when the abducted woman is revealed to be Camille Jordanson, a childhood friend who has become embroiled in a messy counterfeit pill scheme and seems to have made a few enemies in the criminal underworld. Guest starring singer Ne-Yo

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick is shocked to find Hank is dating Adalind, a monster he previously encountered, as the search for Aunt Marie's mystical key grows more desperate

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank investigate a string of murders, and learn their chief suspect - a freedom fighter on the run from assassins - is being harboured by Monroe and Rosalee. Guest starring Sebastian Roche

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Developers Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts take a look at a two-bedroom house in north Kent, a terraced property in Morecambe, Lancashire, and a home in Derbyshire, all of which have been sold at auction

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping Feature. Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one

programme.title: Fantasy Homes by the Sea
programme.desc: Jenni Falconer helps a Northamptonshire couple find their dream coastal home in Italy's Abruzzo region

programme.title: Fantasy Homes by the Sea
programme.desc: Jenni Falconer helps a couple of diving enthusiasts from London find a house on the Jurassic coast near Weymouth, Dorset

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Warren and Jacqui Sumner from Manchester first visited Crete on their honeymoon 23 years ago and have been going back ever since. They've fallen in love with the island and are now determined to buy their very own holiday home there. Danni Menzies shows them five properties for their £75,000 budget, but will any of them be the romantic getaway they've been dreaming of?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Best friends Alison and Sheila want to go halves on a holiday home in Costa Rica to escape the British winters. Danni Menzies shows them five properties for their £300,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Francophiles Madeline and Andy Morton from Portsmouth are looking for a holiday home they can fly or drive to in the rural landscapes of the Charente region in west-central France. With cash savings of £45,000, they're hoping for a traditional two-bedroom home with charm and character. Scarlette Douglas shows them five properties, hoping that one will be their dream house

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps potential buyers Ali Harris and Steve Ashby to explore the beautiful region of Abruzzo in southern Italy, where the dream of retiring to run a B&B

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps house hunters find their dream homes in popular sunny European locations. Potential buyers explore Cinque Terre in Liguria, Italy

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charles Hanson and James Braxton's compete in the challenge and their search for antiques begins in the Highlands, before the duo end their first leg at an auction in Aberdeen

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Charles Hanson drive through Fife and Perthshire to pick up antiques to sell at auction in Dundee, including an expensive Chinese rosewood table

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts James Braxton and Charles Hanson travel south from Glasgow to Ayrshire and Lanarkshire, before selling items at auction in Hamilton

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus and the team clear out a farmhouse in Cumbria, wher they uncover some wonderful antiques, including a box of collectable toy cars and a 19th-century bureau

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The last leg sees James Braxton and Charles Hanson heading south over the Scottish border, taking their final purchases to auction in Berwick-Upon-Tweed in Northumberland. Charles dresses in full Highland regalia to hear how Sir Walter Scott reinvented tartan, while James discovers the story behind one of the most intriguing incidents of the Second World War. James believes silver antiques will steal him victory, but Charles plumps for a little porcelain King Charles Spaniel hoping for big profits

programme.title: Secret Eaters
programme.desc: Anna Richardson meets the Meakins to solve the puzzle of why they are putting on weight. Mum Sue says she only eats healthy food and daughter Natalie does not think her diet is high in sugar, while son Dave, a chef, says he is so busy cooking all day, there is no time to feed himself. Perhaps 24 hours of surveillance will tell a different story. There is also a visit to a supermarket to test the theory that if people shop while they are hungry, they will buy higher-calorie foods

programme.title: Helicopter ER
programme.desc: Paramedics race to the aid of a man who has suffered a life-threatening fall into a ravine, and a 25-year-old man needs treatment for a serious head injury

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me

programme.desc: Two more of Linda Dykes' sharp-eyed recruits tackle homes in dire need of attention. Denise, who was diagnosed with obsessive compulsive disorder in 2002, is taking four days out of her own cleaning regimen to make life easier for 82-year-old former British Aerospace engineer Frank from Chipping Sodbury, south Gloucestershire, while hairdresser Adam heads to Buckinghamshire to help Helen with her piles of clutter. programme.desc: Bo is approached by a strange client, who offers her information about her origins in exchange for the recovery of jewels he has collected over centuries

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Melinda helps the spirit of a teenage girl who is haunting her identical twin sister, now committed to a psychiatric facility because of her strange behaviour following her sibling's death. Supernatural drama, starring Jennifer Love Hewitt

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Melinda is approached by a spirit who was killed in a triathlon cycling accident, and asked to help him save the life of his former fiancee by talking her out of committing suicide. Supernatural drama, starring Sean Maher, Jennifer Love Hewitt and David Conrad

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: A witch poisons Camelot's water supply, sending a terrible sickness through the kingdom. Merlin ignores Gaius's warnings against practising magic and uses it to alleviate Gwen's father's illness, but his actions place the girl's life in danger. Michelle Ryan guest stars alongside Colin Morgan

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Bayard and the knights of the Western Isles arrive in Camelot for a feast celebrating a union between the two kingdoms. Nimueh poses as a serving girl and infiltrates the festivities with a view to gaining revenge on Merlin, poisoning the warlock and sending him into a coma. Clive Russell guest stars

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom conducts inquiries into the discovery of a woman's corpse at a swingers' party and discovers she had already been stabbed before her body was dumped there. Meanwhile, Nick and Warrick deal with the gruesome death of a shopping mall owner - and soon find another victim on the premises. Drama, starring William Petersen and Marg Helgenberger

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad
programme.desc: Exploring how Londoner Samuel Leibowitz started an illicit career in drug-dealing, assisted by his appearance as a Hasidic Jew. However, he found his life endangered after moving to Brazil when other gangs in Sao Paulo put pressure on the enterprise

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Following Australia's traffic enforcers as they deal with high-speed chases, defiant hooligans and explosive crashes

programme.title: Highway Patrol

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness the best and worst behaviour on the nation's busiest motorway

programme.title: Nothing to Declare
programme.desc: Customs question a man who claims to be visiting his internet lover, and officers launch an investigation into illegal fishing, and a woman's life with her boyfriend hangs in the balance

programme.title: Nothing to Declare

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: Landmark series from the 1970s. This edition focuses on the story of glam rock. Featuring David Bowie, Alice Cooper, Jethro Tull and Elton John

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: The landmark series from the 1970s concludes with a look at the role of spirituality and religion in rock

programme.title: Skid Kids (1953)
programme.desc: A group of kids takes on a gang of bike thieves, with a little help from the police. Children's drama, starring Barry MacGregor and Anthony Lang

programme.title: Hell Is a City (1960)
programme.desc: A tough criminal escapes from jail and hatches a scheme to rob a wealthy bookie, little realising a hardened copper is hot on his trail. Thriller, starring Stanley Baker, John Crawford, Donald Pleasence and Billie Whitelaw

programme.title: Piccadilly Incident (1946)
programme.desc: A Wren is pronounced missing in action, but returns three years later to find her husband has remarried. Melodrama, starring Anna Neagle and Michael Wilding

programme.title: Kind Hearts and Coronets (1949)
programme.desc: The penniless grandson of a duke plots to eliminate the eight relatives standing between him and a vast inheritance. He shoots, drowns, poisons and explodes his way through his family tree, but his final triumph is ruined when his lady love's husband kills himself. Ealing black comedy, starring Alec Guinness as all eight potential victims, with Dennis Price, Valerie Hobson and Joan Greenwood

programme.title: Bloomfield (1970)
programme.desc: An Israeli footballer nearing the end of his career is tempted to accept a bribe to throw his final game. A devoted young fan and a woman who is in love with him prick his conscience, but even if he chooses to do the right thing, his failing skills may not be enough to triumph over younger, fitter opposition. Sporting drama based on Joseph Gross' novel, co-directed by and starring Richard Harris, with Romy Schneider and Kim Burfield

programme.title: The Big Shilling
programme.desc: A slice of London social history as crane & ball expert George Lovegrove recalls his life balling buildings and his family history of a dynasty of demolition men

programme.title: Capital Conversation
programme.desc: Author and entrepreneur Michael Hayman interviews the business leaders at the heart of London's most exciting success stories

programme.title: Best of The Tube
programme.desc: Recapping the finest moments from the music show that was hosted by Jools Holland and the late Paula Yates

programme.title: Best of The Tube
programme.desc: Recapping the finest moments from the music show that was hosted by Jools Holland and the late Paula Yates

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: Next Big Thing
programme.desc: International Arts Judge James Nicholls is searching for emerging painters, sculptors, photographers and street artists to help them develop

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: Mike steadfastly resists a management attempt to make the staff wear identical uniforms, convinced it's a move designed to rob them of their individuality _ but a visit from Anne's surprisingly attractive mother soon diverts his attention to more personal matters. Comedy, starring Martin Freeman, Susan Earl and Ken Morley

programme.title: Hot Property (2016)
programme.desc: A corporate spy loses her job after getting caught embezzling, and is no longer able to fund her lavish lifestyle. Faced with being evicted from her rented home, she puts all her skills of deception into fending off the landlord, replacement tenants and a psychotic estate agent. Comedy, starring MyAnna Buring and Tom Rhys Harries

programme.title: Desperate Characters (1971)
programme.desc: A burglary turns a middle-aged couple's life together upside down, and makes them question the fundamental values they've always believed in. Drama, starring Shirley MacLaine, Kenneth Mars, Gerald O'Loughlin and Sada Thompson

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: An insight into how the cessation of open hostilities between Unionist and Nationalists factions in Northern Ireland led to an underground war between militant groups

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: Focusing on renowned villains Eddie and Billy Blundell, this episode also delves into the murky world of rave culture

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: Bernard O'Mahoney explores the injustices suffered by those who have unintentionally surrounded themselves with criminals

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: Michael tries to get Joe Pesci to star in his proposed new film Bongo in the Congo, but receives an unenthusiastic response. The lives, loves and laundry of the famous stars living in leafy Surbiton, as performed by impressionists John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: A 47-year-old man receives a shock when consultant surgeon Shaw Somers reveals he is suffering from metabolic syndrome and his body is more like that of a 60-year-old. A 23-year-old woman seeks help with her extremely bad breath, GP Giovanni Miletto puts together an experimental plan to combat chronic fatigue syndrome, and Pixie McKenna discovers how diet can influence people's chances of developing cancer

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing Brixton and Harmondsworth for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White walks above and alongside two large bodies of water - Ladybower Reservoir and Windermere

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White treks up The Great Orme in North Wales and beside a railway in West Yorkshire

programme.title: Dork Hunters from Outer Space
programme.desc: A group of heroes try to stop aliens taking over the universe

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls try to rescue Captain Sloop with the aid of a champion skateboarder - but X fears they are heading into a trap

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: Kylie's favourite teddy bear is stolen, and a mysterious phone call makes demands for its safe return

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Kong: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Kong, Jason, jungle girl Lua, fun-loving Tann and wise Dr. Jenkins take on power-hungry scientists, ferocious prehistoric creatures and incredible magical beings to protect their unique island home

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Tjure's new baby is having trouble sleeping - and cries so loudly that Halvar also gets no sleep the night before an important battle

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Snorre's mother refuses to let the harvest celebration go ahead until her smelly son has cleaned up his act - so Vic tries to trick him into washing

programme.title: Pocket Dragon Adventures
programme.desc: A group of very small dragons live with a kindly old wizard, they're not big enough to fly but that doesn't stop them having many adventures.

programme.title: Inside Claridge's
programme.desc: For the first time in its long history, the famously discreet luxury hotel in Mayfair, central London, opens its doors to documentary cameras, with director Jane Treays spending a year behind the scenes following staff and guests. The Melchors from California arrive for their annual two-week stay, rekindling their relationship with personal butler Michael Lynch, while energetic general manager Thomas Kochs travels to New York to drum up new business from leading US travel agents

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: Next Big Thing
programme.desc: International Arts Judge James Nicholls is searching for emerging painters, sculptors, photographers and street artists to help them develop

programme.title: Discover London
programme.desc: Explore hidden gems and alternative areas of the capital, learning more about the cultural history of one of the world's greatest cities

programme.title: We Dive at Dawn (1943)
programme.desc: A British submarine crew is unexpectedly ordered to carry out a top-secret mission to sink the German fleet's latest battleship in the Baltic Sea. But it is not long before disaster strikes and the vessel becomes stranded in the middle of the ocean with no fuel or food. Second World War adventure, starring John Mills, Eric Portman, Reginald Purdell and Niall MacGinnis

programme.title: Hell Is a City (1960)
programme.desc: A tough criminal escapes from jail and hatches a scheme to rob a wealthy bookie, little realising a hardened copper is hot on his trail. Thriller, starring Stanley Baker, John Crawford, Donald Pleasence and Billie Whitelaw

programme.title: Danger Man
programme.desc: John Drake (Patrick McGoohan), a secret agent working for NATO, travels to different corners of the world in order to prevent crimes that threaten world peace

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: The Rolling Stones guitarist and former Faces bandmate Ian McLagan reminisce about their time on the road together in the 1970s, and discuss the band's 2011 reunion tour

programme.title: Inside Claridge's
programme.desc: For the first time in its long history, the famously discreet luxury hotel in Mayfair, central London, opens its doors to documentary cameras, with director Jane Treays spending a year behind the scenes following staff and guests. The Melchors from California arrive for their annual two-week stay, rekindling their relationship with personal butler Michael Lynch, while energetic general manager Thomas Kochs travels to New York to drum up new business from leading US travel agents

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: Producer Mark Ronson compares notes with Ronnie about their varied approaches to the recording process, and the pair also discuss artists including Amy Winehouse and Stevie Wonder

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon spreads her wings and takes full advantage of her sister's hospitality, but Tracey is having money worries. Ross Kemp guest stars, with Linda Robson and Pauline Quirke

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: Enticed by the prospect of a big boost to his wages, Mike applies for a job at the detested DIY superstore, while back at Hamway's Hardware, the lads try to entice more women through the door by 'feminising' the premises _ much to the consternation of regular male customers

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: Kenny ropes the lads into helping him build a hi-tech guinea pig hutch complete with swimming pool, while Mike extends the hand of hospitality to a temporarily homeless Rex - who promptly takes over his entire flat and has the temerity to invite a few friends along for good measure. Last in series, starring Martin Freeman, Ken Morley and Peter Serafinowicz

programme.title: Ladies That Punch
programme.desc: Documentary about the Ladies Boxing Association, whose members come from all walks of life, from catwalk models to IT workers

programme.title: Angelica (2017)
programme.desc: A couple in Victorian London endure an unusual series of supernatural happenings following the birth of their child. Drama, starring Jena Malone, Janet McTeer and Ed Stoppard

programme.title: Cruel Passion (1977)
programme.desc: Two sisters are expelled from a nunnery and are plunged into a life of debauchery. While one embraces her new lifestyle, the other is desperate to cling to her old morality and sees a hope of salvation in a mysterious aristocrat who harbours a hidden dark side. Historical drama based on the novel Justine by the Marquis de Sade, starring Koo Stark and Martin Potter

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: Bernard O'Mahoney explores the injustices suffered by those who have unintentionally surrounded themselves with criminals

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: Bernard O'Mahoney looks at the effect of time on gangs and their origins, from bikers to Irish travellers, as their roots are dying out with every new generation

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White walks along the cliffs at Flamborough Head and through Clumber Park, Nottinghamshire

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White treks along the Isle of Man's stunning coast and visits Sprotbrough in South Yorkshire

programme.title: Dork Hunters from Outer Space
programme.desc: A group of heroes try to stop aliens taking over the universe

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls have to babysit Maxine's nephew - who ends up wandering off in a spooky castle where a monster is rumoured to live

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: A super-computer on board a space station kidnaps the girls, intending to use their voices to create a black hole and destroy the world

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Kong: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Kong, Jason, jungle girl Lua, fun-loving Tann and wise Dr. Jenkins take on power-hungry scientists, ferocious prehistoric creatures and incredible magical beings to protect their unique island home

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Gilby and the other children steal the drakkar - but the young captain knows nothing about navigation and soon gets hopelessly lost at sea

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: A phoney sorcerer visits the village, and Vic is determined to uncover the truth behind his apparent magical powers

programme.title: Pocket Dragon Adventures
programme.desc: A group of very small dragons live with a kindly old wizard, they're not big enough to fly but that doesn't stop them having many adventures.

programme.title: Inside Claridge's
programme.desc: Regular guest Alexander, Crown Prince of Yugoslavia, returns to stay in the suite in which he was born in 1945. There are also visits by actress Joan Collins, writer and comedian Stephen Fry and the Emperor of Japan, as well as 85-year-old former bookmaker Gerry Parker, who has breakfasted at Claridge's for the past 40 years. General manager Thomas Kochs takes any change very seriously and oversees every decision necessary - from new alarm clocks to a £10million renovation plan

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: Best of The Tube
programme.desc: Recapping the finest moments from the music show that was hosted by Jools Holland and the late Paula Yates

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: The Rolling Stones guitarist and former Faces bandmate Ian McLagan reminisce about their time on the road together in the 1970s, and discuss the band's 2011 reunion tour

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: Patients with a wide range of ailments are invited to attend the Food Hospital, where consultant surgeon Shaw Somers, dietitian Lucy Jones and GP Giovanni Miletto are among specialists aiming to discover if tailored nutritional programmes can help. Among those in need of assistance are a 24-year-old woman suffering from polycystic ovary syndrome, and a 44-year-old single father battling type 2 diabetes. Pixie McKenna also investigates the truth about superfoods and the programme features an experiment to see if chocolate can help combat high blood pressure

programme.title: Piccadilly Incident (1946)
programme.desc: A Wren is pronounced missing in action, but returns three years later to find her husband has remarried. Melodrama, starring Anna Neagle and Michael Wilding

programme.title: Account Rendered (1957)
programme.desc: Police find no end of suspects with strong motives when they investigate the murder of a wealthy woman. Mystery, starring Griffith Jones and Honor Blackman

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Swan Corner
programme.desc: A day in the life on the High Street in West Wickham, shot in 1968 on 8mm film. Showing activities at different times of the day, including The Swan Pub

programme.title: Sapphire and Steel
programme.desc: While Sapphire is unconscious, her spirit appears on the railway platform with the other ghosts. The soldier is not through with trying to get rid of Steel

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: Producer Mark Ronson compares notes with Ronnie about their varied approaches to the recording process, and the pair also discuss artists including Amy Winehouse and Stevie Wonder

programme.title: Inside Claridge's
programme.desc: Regular guest Alexander, Crown Prince of Yugoslavia, returns to stay in the suite in which he was born in 1945. There are also visits by actress Joan Collins, writer and comedian Stephen Fry and the Emperor of Japan, as well as 85-year-old former bookmaker Gerry Parker, who has breakfasted at Claridge's for the past 40 years. General manager Thomas Kochs takes any change very seriously and oversees every decision necessary - from new alarm clocks to a £10million renovation plan

programme.title: Sapphire and Steel
programme.desc: Part seven of eight. The agents find they have travelled 12 days into the future, in which time the ghosts have vanished and Tully has made a dangerous bargain

programme.title: Danger Man
programme.desc: John Drake (Patrick McGoohan), a secret agent working for NATO, travels to different corners of the world in order to prevent crimes that threaten world peace

programme.title: After You've Gone
programme.desc: Comedy following the life of divorcee Jimmy Venables after his former wife leaves to perform charity work in Africa, prompting his mother-in-law to move in to the family home. Nicholas Lyndhurst and Celia Imrie star

programme.title: The Watchmaker
programme.desc: Documentary about Clifford Bowler's watchmaking shop in West Hampstead. Clifford was a Mill Lane tradesman for over 67 years

programme.title: A Perfect 14 ()
programme.desc: The fascinating world of plus-size modelling and the women involved who are fighting to reshape fashion and the standards of society

programme.title: The Occupation
programme.desc: The incredible true story of Sara Góralnik who at age 13 survived the Holocaust by taking refuge in a small Ukrainian village and passing as a Christian after her entire family was killed by Nazis

programme.title: Perfect Skin (2018)
programme.desc: Katia Matuschak, an 18-year-old Polish woman, embarks on a relationship with mysterious tattoo artist Bob Reid. However, their relationship takes a dark turn as her fascination with him grows, and in an attempt to fulfil his dream, he kidnaps her. Psychological horror, starring Richard Brake, Natalia Kostrzewa and Jo Woodcock

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: Bernard O'Mahoney explores the media's influence on building male celebrities

programme.title: The Comic Strip Presents
programme.desc: An American woman and a comedian's girlfriend both do their utmost to get into Oxford university to study the works of Lord Byron - but what will they do to gain a place at the great seat of learning? Comedy, starring Jennifer Saunders, Dawn French, Lenny Henry and Nigel Planer

programme.title: Skid Kids (1953)
programme.desc: A group of kids takes on a gang of bike thieves, with a little help from the police. Children's drama, starring Barry MacGregor and Anthony Lang

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz show in which pairs of contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions posed to 100 people before the show. programme.title: Live Test Cricket
programme.desc: West Indies v Sri Lanka. Coverage from the first day of the Second and Final Test in the series from Sir Vivian Richards Stadium in Antigua. The last test series to take place between the two sides was back in 2018, when the series ended in a 1-1 draw. That series result left the West Indies without a series win against Sri Lanka since 2003, when the home side won a three-match series 1-0.

programme.title: World Darts Championship
programme.desc: The afternoon session on day nine of this year's tournament. This stage last year saw Fallon Sherrock shock the darts world with a 3-1 win over Austrian Mensur Suljovic in the second round. That win was Sherrock's second victory in the tournament, after her history-making win over Ted Evetts. Other winners at this stage last year were Australia's Simon Whitlock, and Englishmen Adrian Lewis, Daryl Gurney and Glen Durrant
